Event: The Underwater Adventure
Event Date: 01/05/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E24
Invigorating Arrow Engraving

Enhancement: 1
When attacking, the unit has a 25% chance to fire an additional healing arrow at a random ally. On hit, the arrow restores 1% / 2% / 3% / 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% of the max health.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Dodge from the gems
When attacking, the unit has a 25% chance to fire additional healing arrows at 2 random allies. On hit, the arrow restores 3% / 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% of the unit's max health and removes a random debuff.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Dodge from the gems
When attacking, the unit has a 25% chance to fire additional healing arrows at 3 random allies. On hit, the arrow restores 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% of the unit's max health, restores a random debuff, and casts a shield that absorbs 3 attacks of any type.
